title: Home
content: 🪴 Welcome to my Digital Garden This is a collection of my thoughts, active projects, and technical deep-dives. Unlike a traditional blog, this space is "living"—notes here grow from seeds to evergreens as I learn more. 🛠️ Devlogs Tracking the progress of my latest builds and experiments. devlog-001 – Initializing the garden and custom subdomains. project-alpha – Building a new CLI tool for productivity. server-migration – Why I moved from Netlify to GitHub Pages. 🧠 Thoughts Raw ideas, mental models, and things I'm currently pondering. Nix OS - My experience – Why shipping fast beats shipping perfect. 🔗 Find Me Online Platform Link GitHub https://github.com/p1xlized Portfolio pixlized.net Email contact-me@pixlized.net
